classroomsubmit

Google Classroom REST attach + turn-in, no browser — bypasses the cross-origin Drive Picker iframe that blocks every automation.

python ≥3.8stdlib-onlyOAuth installed-appMIT
github.com/yolo-labz/claude-classroom-submit
pattern
Classroom REST API direct — modifyAttachments + turnIn atomic
trade-off
one-time OAuth installed-app setup vs. picker-iframe deadlock
scopes
classroom.courses.readonly · classroom.coursework.me · nothing else
supply chain
PEP 740 attestations · Sigstore · dual SBOM (CycloneDX 1.7 + SPDX 2.3)
